title: Ethiopian Egg Yolk Berbere Stew
description: A spicy, flavorful stew featuring deep-fried egg yolks in a rich berbere sauce. Serve solo as a dinner or snack.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 1 chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add 2 minced cloves of garlic and 1 inch of grated ginger and cook for 1 minute more.
Mix in 1 tablespoon of berbere spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the stew is cooking, deep-fry 6 egg yolks in hot oil until golden brown and crispy.
Add the fried egg yolks to the stew and simmer for 2 minutes more.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and black pepper as needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped green chilies if desired.
Note: for an extra spicy kick, add more cayenne pepper to taste.
